author: mariusvanderwijden
content: I would prefer EIP-Name(#Number) , e.g. FOCIL (#7805)

author: draganrakita
content: Nit, can we do number first `eip7805-focil`. Some eips got oppened in same time so they could be related.

author: sky.cactus
content: Since the channels will all presumably be inside the `EIP-development` category, it seems we could drop the `epi` prefix and do `#7805-focil`?

author: draganrakita
content: i like having `eip` but this is a nitpick
